prompt: Studio product photograph of a closed black hardcover bound notebook with a sewn fabric spine and a thin elastic closure band stretched diagonally across the cover, lying flat-angle on a worn dark walnut wood surface. A wooden carpenter's pencil with a flat oval cross-section rests at a slight angle alongside the notebook to the right. The notebook cover is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO foil-stamping, NO print, NO graphics, NO text anywhere on the cover — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Slight three-quarter angle from upper-front, soft window light from camera-left, subtle shadow along the right edge of the notebook. Slightly desaturated palette. Documentary trade-tools catalog feel, NOT stationery-brand minimalist. No paper visible, no other items, no people.
